queries.q: Take this PRD and give me tailored versions for engineering, design, data, and our exec sponsor
I need to brief five different teams on this launch, each with what they actually care about; produce one master and a per-audience version
Turn these experiment results into audience-specific briefings for the exec, PMM, and data teams
Fan this spec out into stakeholder briefings for engineering, legal, and the board
Same content, different audiences: repackage this research synthesis for UX, sales, and leadership
We're pivoting; I have to tell six audiences and they each need a different framing. Give me a master plus a briefing per group
Create per-stakeholder briefings from this GTM plan so each team gets the cut that matters to them
Project this incident write-up into separate briefings for engineering, support, and the exec team
I keep rewriting the same update three ways for three audiences; generate all the audience versions from one source at once
Give me an exec briefing of this spec re-pitched for a non-technical leadership audience
queries.notes: N=1 from a non-meeting source is supported

queries.q: Write the post-meeting update to stakeholders about what we decided in today's planning meeting
queries.notes: One async update of meeting outcomes; meeting-bound, single audience

queries.q: Draft a Slack update to the team summarizing the outcomes of our sprint review meeting
queries.notes: Meeting-outcome update, not a multi-audience fan-out

queries.q: Map who the stakeholders are for this migration, their influence and interest, and how to engage them
queries.notes: Mapping stakeholders, not communicating to them

queries.q: Create a buyer persona for our enterprise healthcare segment
queries.notes: A customer/buyer viewpoint, not stakeholder briefings

queries.q: Write the customer-facing release notes for the 4.2 launch
queries.notes: Public release notes, not internal audience briefings

queries.q: Draft the agenda for next Tuesday's cross-team kickoff meeting
Help me fix a flaky Playwright test that only fails in CI
Write a SQL query listing the top 20 accounts by support ticket volume
